---
title: "Kyle Tolliver"
---

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r pic, fig.align='left', out.width='25%'}
me <- 'https://media-exp1.licdn.com/dms/image/C5603AQH6x5MaoFUa7g/profile-displayphoto-shrink_200_200/0?e=1587600000&v=beta&t=B6pWn21WAljSgIUqCLGL0b6V4-z44jfKZpO6mmxwaIQ'
knitr::include_graphics(me)
```

## About Me

Experienced Laboratory Assistant with a demonstrated history of working in the computer hardware industry. Skilled in Python, C++, Assembly, Verilog and more. Working on Bachelor's degree focused in Computer Engineering and Computer Science from BYU - Idaho. 

<br> <br> 

#####  *--- Website is made with [Rmd files](https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com/index.html) and [Rstudio](https://rstudio.com/)*

#####  *--- Hosted on [github](https://github.com/kctolli/kctolli.github.io)*
